item.title: Irish Pub Nachos
item.description: Irish Pub Nachos with a simple, hearty comfort-food feel. A fun twist on classic nachos, served up with a cozy homemade touch.

media:content.media:title: Irish Pub Nachos
media:content.media:description: Irish Pub Nachos with a simple, hearty comfort-food feel. A fun twist on classic nachos, served up with a cozy homemade touch.

item.title: Watermelon Jello in a Watermelon
item.description: A fun watermelon jello dessert made right in the watermelon, with lots of fruit. A simple way to bring a little summer flavor back.

media:content.media:title: Watermelon Jello in a Watermelon
media:content.media:description: A fun watermelon jello dessert made right in the watermelon, with lots of fruit. A simple way to bring a little summer flavor back.

item.title: Chocolate Covered Pretzel Bark
